# Run Spec 20260513-122533-a14e39

*Generated by [copilot.roesli.org](https://copilot.roesli.org) on 2026-05-13 12:25:33Z.*

This document is the **input contract** for one execution of the
[Bob the Builder medallion prompt](https://github.com/Remc0000/Fabric/blob/main/prompt.md).
The orchestrator notebook reads these parameters and produces a
Bronze/Silver/Gold lakehouse (plus a Power BI report when the source matches a
known shape).

## Run identification
| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Run ID | `20260513-122533-a14e39` |
| Timestamp (UTC) | `2026-05-13 12:25:33Z` |
| Workspace | `ca85ec47-ed39-4b52-be27-50aa56979216` |

## Source
- **Lakehouse**: `Lakehouse` (`af885f11-3a06-4f61-b5c7-901cc30889d7`)
- **Tables to ingest** (`Tables/SalesLT/Customer,Tables/SalesLT/Product,Tables/SalesLT/SalesOrderHeader,Tables/SalesLT/SalesOrderDetail`):
- `Tables/SalesLT/Customer`
- `Tables/SalesLT/Product`
- `Tables/SalesLT/SalesOrderHeader`
- `Tables/SalesLT/SalesOrderDetail`

## Target
- **New Lakehouse**: `CopilotMedallion_20260513_122533` (created in the same workspace).
- Schemas inside that lakehouse:
  - `bronze` — raw 1:1 copies of source tables (Delta).
  - `silver` — cleaned/typed copies with normalised column names.
  - `gold` — star schema (`dim_*`, `fact_*`) when source matches AdventureWorksLT;
    otherwise simple curated tables only.

## Build plan
1. Validate that all selected tables exist in the source lakehouse.
2. For each selected table:
   - Read via `spark.read.format("delta").load(...)`.
   - Write to `<target>.bronze.<table_lower>` (overwrite, schema merge).
3. Generate Silver:
   - Drop fully-null columns.
   - Trim string columns; cast numeric strings where unambiguous.
   - Add `_silver_ts` audit column.
4. If `Customer`, `Product`, `SalesOrderHeader`, `SalesOrderDetail` are all present (case-insensitive),
   build the AdventureWorksLT star schema in Gold:
   - `dim_customer`, `dim_product`, `dim_date`
   - `fact_sales` joined on the dim keys
5. Otherwise skip Gold-modelling and leave Silver as the final curated layer.
6. (Future) deploy a PBIP report template against Gold when the star schema exists.

## Idempotency
Re-running with the same `RUN_ID` overwrites bronze/silver/gold partitions but keeps
the lakehouse. Re-running with a new `RUN_ID` creates a new lakehouse.
